tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, presence of glucose, bilirubin, and ketones). No signs of urinary infection. Findings suggest possible acute or chronic kidney disease with glycemic disturbances; further nephrological and endocrinological evaluation is recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
